p2p_id.description: Peer-to-peer event identifier for the completed discussion.

requested_cpt.description: Requested procedure CPT code from the authorization line.

criteria_results.description: Map the applicable PET MPI criterion IDs to their final review result.

unresolved_criteria.ordering: List unresolved criterion IDs in ascending criterion ID order. Use an empty list only if no applicable criteria remain unresolved.

new_information_changed_review.description: Whether the P2P supplied new patient-specific information that materially changed the review.

missing_pet_factors.ordering: Use the order shown in choices and include each PET-over-SPECT factor that remains unsupported.

internal_appeal_deadline.description: Use null only when no internal appeal deadline applies.

basis_audit.description: Business basis audit trail. Record the source-precedence rule, the ordered record precedence trail, the environment record IDs that directly control the result, and the exception/gap records that explain exclusions, denials, missing information, or route priority.

controlling_record_ids.ordering_rule: Use the operational evidence order for the records that directly control the result.

exception_record_ids.ordering_rule: Use business gap/exception order: criteria or route gaps before stale or excluded records when both appear.

precedence_record_order.ordering_rule: List the controlling and exception records in source-precedence order, highest priority first.

numeric_precision: No numeric amount fields are required for this task.
date_precision: Dates must be ISO 8601 calendar dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
